name: contact
description: A lead-capture section: a short pitch beside a form. Drives the primary conversion goal. Composed from the form-field component.

type.description: text | email | tel | textarea | select. Defaults to text.

required.description: Whether the field must be completed.

placeholder.description: Optional placeholder (never a substitute for the label).

responsive.base: Single column: pitch above the form.
responsive.lg: Split into two columns — pitch and form side by side.

notes: Every field has a visible label programmatically associated with its control.
Required fields are indicated in text/attribute, not by color alone.
The form exposes an accessible name; errors set aria-invalid and aria-describedby.
The submit control has a specific, action-oriented label.

elementor.notes: Compiles to a single Elementor Pro Form widget; content.fields become the form's fields and submitLabel its button text.

mapping.fields: Form → Form Fields (label, type, required, placeholder)
